summary: Comprehensive testing of EngineOps AI-native engineering operations platform completed. Both backend API and frontend UI testing were successful with minor GitHub API integration issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 403 Forbidden when accessing GitHub repos without authentication
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Provide GitHub token for public repos or use authenticated access

integration_issues.issue: GitHub API rate limiting causes 403 errors when creating projects without tokens

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
Bug-fix pipeline interface with CI log input
Existing project bugfix results display with 3 patches
All landing page sections present (hero, problem, why now, how it works, defensibility, partners, demo, CTA)
action_item_for_main_agent: GitHub API integration requires token authentication to avoid rate limiting. Consider adding better error handling for GitHub API 403 responses or implementing retry logic with exponential backoff.
